description: Develop granular consent mechanisms for data processing, particularly for cross-device tracking and data sharing with advertisers, to comply with GDPR.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the user is presented with consent options, WHEN they select their preferences, THEN their choices should be accurately reflected in the data processing activities.

description: Perform a full GDPR compliance audit of the PersonaLens profiling system to address legal concerns regarding data processing and consent mechanisms.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the audit team is assembled, WHEN they review the profiling system, THEN they should identify all areas of non-compliance and provide actionable recommendations.

description: Implement a data ingestion pipeline that captures browsing history, click patterns, scroll depth, and time-on-page metrics for each authenticated user. The pipeline must handle at minimum 50k events/second at peak and store raw events with full user identifiers for profile enrichment downstream.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the user is authenticated, WHEN they browse content, THEN their browsing history, click patterns, scroll depth, and time-on-page metrics are captured and streamed to the data lake in near real-time.

description: Implement monitoring for the Privacy Opt-Out Rate to ensure compliance with privacy regulations and maintain user trust.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is in place, WHEN users opt out of data tracking, THEN the opt-out rate should be accurately recorded and reported.

description: Build a recommendation engine that uses accumulated user profile data to serve personalized content suggestions. The model should incorporate collaborative filtering and content-based approaches, targeting a 20% improvement in content CTR within 60 days.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user profile data is available, WHEN the recommendation engine processes this data, THEN it should serve personalized content suggestions that improve content CTR by at least 20% within 60 days.

description: Link user activity across mobile app and web browser sessions using deterministic and probabilistic matching to enable a unified user profile regardless of device.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is logged in on multiple devices, WHEN they interact with content, THEN their activity should be linked across devices to maintain a unified user profile.

description: Create an API and batch export system that shares anonymized user profile segments with advertising partners while ensuring compliance with GDPR.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user profile segments are ready for export, WHEN the API is called, THEN it should return anonymized cohort-level data without risking individual re-identification.

description: Build a user-facing dashboard that displays what behavioral data has been collected about them, including inferred interests and engagement patterns. Include toggles to opt out of specific tracking categories.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the user accesses their dashboard, WHEN they view their data, THEN they should see their inferred interests, content categories, and engagement patterns along with options to opt out of specific tracking categories.

description: Develop a transparency dashboard that shows users what data is collected about them, enhancing user trust and engagement.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the user accesses the transparency dashboard, WHEN they view their data, THEN they should see a clear representation of what data is collected and how it is used.

description: Implement a system for collecting user feedback on the personalization features to continuously improve the user experience.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback collection system is active, WHEN users interact with personalization features, THEN they should be prompted to provide feedback on their experience.
